anyFit: anyFit: Exploratory Data Analysis on xts timeseries objects and spatial netCDF objects

Source: R/anyFit-package.R
anyFit-package.Rd

Package for exploratory data analysis, timeseries analysis and visualisation of point and spatially distributed environmental variables.

Details

anyFit streamlines exploratory data analysis of point and gridded hydroclimatic time series: loading (NetCDF and delimited files), summary statistics, temporal aggregation, and distribution fitting by the method of L-moments, all built on the xts time-series format and ggplot2 visualisation. Gridded data are carried in the sxts (spatial xts) class, which stores coordinates and projection alongside the series.

The package ships a real example dataset used throughout the vignettes and examples: an E-OBS ensemble-mean daily rainfall grid over Europe (0.25 degrees, 2011-2022), installed at system.file("extdata", "rr_ens_mean_0.25deg_reg_2011-2022_v27.0e.nc", package = "anyFit"). Load it with nc2xts(), typically clipped to a region, e.g. nc2xts(f, "rr", country = "U.K. of Great Britain and Northern Ireland"). A daily station series in system.file("extdata", "KNMI_Daily.csv", package = "anyFit") illustrates delim2xts().
